data.title: Live! Casino Virginia opens with 900 slots, 33 table games, donating $15,050,000 to City of Petersburg and charities.
data.description: The newly opened Live! Casino in Virginia offers 900 Vegas-style slot machines and 33 live-action table games, providing the signature excitement that Live! is known for. A significant amount of $15,050,000 has been contributed to the City of Petersburg and local charities to support city initiatives, community programs, and nonprofit organizations. Additionally, the casino is set to host Pro Football events and activities.

data.title: In Alpharetta, GA, Jeff Ecklund discusses painting vinyl siding in Georgia's climate to last.
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia on January 23, 2026, a question was raised about the durability of painting vinyl siding in the state's challenging climate conditions of heat, humidity, and intense sunlight. Jeff Ecklund from Rhino Shield by Georgia Coatings, Inc. offered expert advice in a HelloNation article on this matter.

data.title: Ontario hospitals facing funding cuts leading to longer wait times and job losses, with only 2% funding increase until 2027-28.
data.description: Toronto is facing a concerning situation as job cuts in the healthcare sector have reached alarming numbers. The cutbacks, reminiscent of the era of Mike Harris, have led to hundreds of layoffs in hospitals across Ontario. This has resulted in extended wait times and disrupted patient care services. The government's directive for hospitals to anticipate only a two per cent annual increase in funding until 2027-28, a significant drop from the previous average of six per cent, is causing further strain. The funding strategy proposed by the Ford administration is expected to result in over 10,000 job terminations and downsizing of the healthcare workforce.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Brooklyn creates LHIDER - a modified cigarette lighter (MBQ-822) to store unfinished cigarette.
data.description: On January 23, 2026 in Pittsburgh, a new lighter called LHIDER was introduced by an inventor from Brooklyn, New York. This innovative product was created to address the issue of storing unfinished cigarettes easily. The inventor explained that the design of LHIDER eliminates the necessity of discarding partial cigarettes. The new invention aims to offer a practical solution to smokers and has the potential to reduce cigarette waste.

data.title: Thea education platform ranks #3 on TAAFT in 2025, outperforming thousands, gaining global recognition.
data.description: An education platform has emerged as one of the leading names in the field of Artificial Intelligence. Thea, an AI-driven study platform, has achieved the remarkable feat of securing the third position on the global leaderboard for the Best AI Tool of 2025. Outshining thousands of tools worldwide, this platform has proven its worth by offering personalized learning experiences. This recognition underscores its significance in the AI landscape, where it competes with numerous other tools for the top spot. The impressive ranking highlights the platform's effectiveness and popularity, positioning it as a key player in the industry.

data.title: CrossCountry Mortgage, #1 retail mortgage lender for 3rd year, adds Sam Sharp as RVP in Chicago.
data.description: Cleveland, on January 23, 2026 - CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) has announced the appointment of Sam Sharp as the Regional Executive Vice President to enhance its position in the Chicago market. CCM has topped as the leading retail mortgage lender in the nation for the third year in a row. This strategic move is aimed at solidifying its foothold in Chicago and continuing its growth trajectory in the mortgage industry.

data.title: Ford's Garage opens 22nd FL location on Rinehart Road in Sanford, FL. Iconic dining experience with burgers and craft beer.
data.description: A popular burger and craft beer restaurant has launched its 22nd branch in Florida, located on Rinehart Road in SANFORD. The restaurant, Ford's Garage, is celebrated for its nostalgic American cuisine and selection of craft beers. This latest opening marks a significant expansion for the brand in Central Florida.

data.title: RIKS 26 0216 series reaches 47.38 billion (nominal value) after buyback on Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: Following the buyback on January 23, 2026, the total size of the RIKS 26 0216 series amounts to 47,383,080,943 in nominal value.

data.title: Sigri Indian BBQ expands to Brooklyn, targeting NYC for growth. First North Indian BBQ franchise. Franchise agreement signed.
data.description: A renowned North Indian barbecue franchise, Craveworthy Brands' concept Sigri Indian BBQ (Sigri) has made a significant move by expanding its footprint into the Northeast region, targeting New York City for key development. The franchise agreement was signed in Brooklyn on January 23, 2026. This development marks a pivotal moment in the company's growth strategy, with plans to bring their unique culinary experience to a new market. Sigri's entry into New York City reflects its commitment to expansion, showcasing its popularity and potential among diverse audiences.

data.title: FedEx launching private offering of senior notes via FedEx Freight for planned Spin-Off from FedEx Corp.
data.description: FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) revealed its subsidiary, FedEx Freight Holding Company, Inc., has started a private offering of senior notes, aimed to support the separation of the Issuer from FedEx. This move, known as the Spin-Off, will involve the Issuer taking charge of FedEx's less-than-truckload (LTL) freight transportation services. The Notes are a key part of this financing strategy for the Spin-Off.

data.title: RWC introduces advanced training center highlighting product range and innovation. ASX: RWC. Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: A presentation highlighting the diverse product lineup, advanced technology, and upcoming plumbing trends of the RWC family of top brands is set to take place in Atlanta on January 23, 2026. Reliance Worldwide Corporation (ASX: RWC), a renowned producer, will showcase this event.

data.title: Healthcare Analytics Market to reach $166.65 billion by 2030, growing from $55.52 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 24.6%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 23, 2026, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the Healthcare Analytics Market is forecasted to increase from approximately USD 55.52 billion in 2025 to USD 166.65 billion by 2030, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 24.6%. The data is based on analysis across 516 market Tables and 55 Figures distributed in 411.

data.title: Inventor from Bronx develops high-definition TV (CLEAN CONNECT) to eliminate cables. Pittsburg, Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 23, 2026, an inventor from Bronx, New York, unveiled a revolutionary high-definition television called CLEAN CONNECT. The inventor expressed the desire to eliminate the necessity of running cables between the television and different devices. This innovative TV aims to offer convenience and a clutter-free solution to traditional setups by incorporating cutting-edge technology.

data.title: RIKS 26 0216 series size after buyback on Jan 23 is 47,383,080,943 (nominal value) - a significant increase.
data.description: After the buyback on January 23rd, the RIKS 26 0216 series has increased to a total size of 47,383,080,943 in nominal value.

data.title: US stocks mixed; Dow falls over 200 points. Dow at 49,158.56 (-0.46%), NASDAQ at 23,481.32 (+0.19%), S&P 500 at 6,915.27 (+0.03%). Energy shares gain 1.3%, financial stocks dip 0.8%. SLB Limited Q4 revenue: $9.745B. Diluted GAAP EPS at 55 cents.
data.description: This morning in the U.S., stocks saw a rise, despite the Dow Jones index falling over 200 points on Friday. As of the market opening today, the Dow was down by 0.46% at 49,158.56, the NASDAQ increased by 0.19% to 23,481.32, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.03% to 6,915.27. Energy shares experienced a gain of 1.3%, while financial stocks fell by 0.8% on Friday. SLB Limited (NYSE: SLB) reported fourth-quarter results on Friday, showing a sequential improvement with revenue totaling $9.745 billion, a 5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the $9.547 billion estimate by analysts. Diluted GAAP earnings per share were 55 cents, a decline from 77 cents in the previous year. For further information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
